name: postman-api-automation-framework
description: Enterprise-grade API automation framework using Postman + Newman with CI/CD integration

scripts.test:users: newman run collections/user_management.postman_collection.json -e environments/dev.postman_environment.json -d data/users_data.json -r cli,html,junit --reporter-html-export reports/users-report.html --reporter-junit-export reports/users-junit.xml
scripts.test:orders: newman run collections/orders_api.postman_collection.json -e environments/dev.postman_environment.json -d data/orders_data.csv -r cli,html,junit --reporter-html-export reports/orders-report.html --reporter-junit-export reports/orders-junit.xml
scripts.test:all: npm run test:users && npm run test:orders

author: Shanaka Fernando <https://www.linkedin.com/in/shanaka-qe/>
